/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/cutefish-platformtheme.dir/link.d  -o libcutefish-platformtheme.so "CMakeFiles/cutefish-platformtheme.dir/cutefish-platformtheme_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/cutefish-platformtheme.dir/platformtheme.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/cutefish-platformtheme.dir/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/cutefish-platformtheme.dir/hintsettings.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/cutefish-platformtheme.dir/qdbusmenubar.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/cutefish-platformtheme.dir/systemtrayicon.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/cutefish-platformtheme.dir/x11integration.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/cutefish-platformtheme.dir/statusnotifierwatcher_interface.cpp.o"  /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libKF6WindowSystem.so.6.25.0 /usr/lib/libSM.so /usr/lib/libICE.so /usr/lib/libX11.so /usr/lib/libXext.so -lxcb /usr/lib/libxkbcommon.so /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6DBus.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libX11.so
